brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: During those bursts — what fraction are errors? Show me both rates for the hot minutes.

expected.sql: SELECT minute, ROUND(n / 60.0, 2) AS rps, ROUND(errors / 60.0, 2) AS err_rps FROM metrics WHERE service = 'chrono-portal-mirror' AND ROUND(n / 60.0, 2) > 1.0 ORDER BY minute

hints.text: Carol: 'Too many rows. The WHERE clause filters to hot minutes only.'
Carol: 'Not enough rows. The error field is errors.'
Carol: 'Query error. The field inside the second rate() is errors.'
Carol: 'Wrong values. The error field is errors — the error count column.'
Carol: 'rate(errors, 1m). Same pattern as rps but for the errors column.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: Every burst has errors. Not some — every single one. This thing is trying to do something and partially failing every time it fires.
